# GitHub Copilot instructions

This file defers to the workspace-level agent guidance in AGENTS.md.

Primary actions for Copilot/AI agents:
- Read [AGENTS.md](AGENTS.md) first to understand repository expectations.
- Ask the repository owner which language and framework to scaffold before making build or test changes.
- Make minimal, incremental changes and describe intent in commit messages or PR descriptions.

If you are an AI assistant running with more permissions, consult AGENTS.md for `/create-scaffold` and other helper commands.
